name: calicoctl
title: calicoctl
summary: networking and network security solution for Kubernetes
description:
networking and network security solution for Kubernetes
This package contains the command line tool for calico. Calico is a widely
adopted, battle-tested open source networking and network security solution
for Kubernetes, virtual machines, and bare-metal workloads.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use calicoctl because networking and network security solution for Kubernetes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use calicoctl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `calicoctl [options] [args]` as documented upstream for calicoctl.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair calicoctl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `calicoctl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
